description: Fire, ice, water, air, earth, and weather. Harnessing nature's forces for practical ends.
powers: Lightning Rod
The item drinks lightning. Bolts bend toward it, pulled from the sky and swallowed whole before they can strike elsewhere.
Purifying Flow
Foul water runs clean at this item's touch. Mud, poison, rot. All of it washed away, leaving only what is pure.
Petal Rain
Rainfall transforms into drifting flower petals around the wielder. A gentle beauty that replaces the storm.
Climate Warden
The air obeys. A room grows warmer or cooler at the wielder's wish, as if the seasons answer to them.
Verdant Surge
Nearby plants grow with reckless speed. Seedlings stretch into saplings, buds burst open, roots dig deep.
Temperate Shell
Heat and cold lose their grip on the wielder. Deserts and tundras feel the same, like a mild afternoon.
Rainmaker
A small cloud appears and delivers gentle rain exactly where it is needed. A farmer's quiet miracle.
Dew Gather
Moisture collects from thin air, condensing into clean drinking water. Even the driest air yields its hidden reserve.
Heat Sink
The item devours flame. Fires gutter and die in its presence as it absorbs their warmth into itself.
Hearthglow
A comforting warmth radiates from the item. The cold retreats, and frostbite finds no purchase nearby.
Cool Mantle
The wielder carries their own shade. Scorching heat slides off them, unable to take hold.
Flame Walk
Mundane fire parts around the wielder like water around stone. They pass through unburned and unbothered.
Wind Sculptor
The wielder shapes gusts into solid forms. Walls of air, steps of breeze, brief and beautiful.
Storm Quell
Raging weather relents. Winds calm, rain softens, thunder falls silent. The storm simply decides to stop.
Fertile Touch
Barren dirt darkens and softens beneath this item. Dead soil remembers how to grow things.
Insect Shepherd
Beneficial insects swarm to nearby crops, pollinating and protecting. A silent alliance between item and hive.
Flash Freeze
Water turns to ice in an instant. Still pools, rushing streams. All of it locked solid between one breath and the next.
Thaw Touch
Ice surrenders at contact. Frozen locks, iced-over paths, winter's grip. All of it melts away willingly.
Clearing Breeze
A gentle wind rises from nowhere, sweeping away smoke, fog, and foul air. Only clean breath remains.
Spark Shower
Harmless sparks cascade from the item like tiny stars. They burn nothing, but they light up the night beautifully.
